title: Stocks Drop as Inflation Risk Emerges in Wake of Iran War
summary_full: The S&P 500 recovered ground in the afternoon but still ended the day lower, as investors sought cover from the unpredictable effects that the fighting could have on the world economy.
summary_public: The S&P 500 recovered ground in the afternoon but still ended the day lower, as investors sought cover from the unpredictable effects that the fighting could have on the world economy.

IR.label: negative
